---
id: upload-holidays
title: "Upload holidays"
description: "Bulk upload holidays for a calendar code. Replaces existing entries for the same dates."

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/calendars/{code}/holidays"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Bulk upload holidays for a calendar code. Replaces existing entries for the same dates.
